---
title: "utilisation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{utilisation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(augustin.lefevre.m1ecap)
head(df_football)

filtrer_resultat(df_football, "H")

calcul_buts_moyens(df_football)

plot_buts_moyens(df_football)
```
